allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''Agent: {a[""name""]} \({a[""id""]}\)\\nSessions: {len\(a[""sessionHistory""]\)}\\nPersonality length: {len\(a[""personality""]\)} chars\\n''\) for a in d]")
Bash(git stash push -m "local changes before pull" --include-untracked)
Bash(git add apps/server/src/ai/tts-service.ts apps/server/src/ai/voice-config.ts apps/web/src/hooks/useNarration.ts scripts/ apps/server/audio-cache/)
